score_metadata.score_rule: For DA2K margin m = depth(point1)-depth(point2), zeroing scalar w has first-order effect delta_m ~= -w * grad_m(w). positive_wgrad protects scalars whose removal lowers m; abs_wgrad is first-order scalar saliency magnitude. Taylor loss scores approximate the change in softplus(-m/tau) under w->0 using a local-linear margin model and derivatives through third order.
